titleStmt.title: SII 29.146: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 146. (A.R. No. B. 629 of 1961-62.) KERAVASE, KARKALA TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab setup in the prākāra of Hirebasti of Vardhamanasvami.

It records a gift of land and 5 Bārakūru gadyāṇa by the king of Keravase-Karkala, Vira-Pānḍyadēvarasa to Sanjāra seṭṭi, the nephew of Sanjaraḍahā of the Puḷi-seṭṭi baḷi (lineage) with the stipulation that the donee should maintain the burning of a perpetual lamp in front of Vardhamānaswamy of Keravase. The record gives details of land so granted and made free of all taxes. Panḍari sēnabova son of Dēvappa sēnabova wrote this record.
It it dated Śaka 1371, Śukla, Kartika, śu. 1, Sunday. It corresponds to 1449 A.D., October 17, Friday [not Sunday].

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmatparamagaṁbhīrasyādhvādāmōghalāṁchanaṁ . jīyā
trailōkyanāthasyaśāsanaṁ jinaśāsanaṁ . svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śaka
varuṣa 1371 neya śukla saṁvatsarada kārttika śu 1 Ādivāradaṁdu śrī matpa
ṭṭipoṁbucca purēśvarādhīśvararuṁ padmāvatīdēvilabdhavaraprasādaru śrī jinada
ttānvayavārdhivardhasudākararuṁ kalikālasuvarṇnakalaśasthāpa
nācāryyaruṁ bhāṣegetappuvarāyaragaṁḍaṁ śrī madabhinavacāuṁ
ḍarāyarumappa Arirāyaragaṁḍarādāvaṇi śrīvīra pāṁḍyadēvara
sa Oḍeyaru keravase kārakaḷadalu sthira rājyaṁgeyyutteha kāla
dalu puḷiseṭṭi baḷiya saṁjaraḍahānaḷiya saṁjarase
ṭṭi muṁna rāmanātha Oḍeyaruyiddalliye pāṁḍyadē
varasa Oḍeyara sēveya māḍidanimitta Avarutā
rājyastharāgirddu A saṁjaraseṭṭige māḍikoṭṭa śilā
śāsanada kramaveṁteṁdare A saṁjara seṭṭigū māṇikase
ṭṭiṁ baḷiya gūhudu vinabāḷu Akkurkkala koṭṭi
rāḍiya beṭṭu Ā koṭṭa rāḍiya bayalalu bittu hā
ne mūvattaṟa lekkadamūḍe hadimūṟakkaṁ kūvettimaru
Oṁdu mattaṁ Ālekkada bittumūḍe Āṟakkaṁ gōḷitti maru
Oṁdu mūḍalu teṁkalu Ayitegadeṁ baḷiya melaṁṭa
na Ōju paḍuvalu Ā baḷiya dattu kāḍana Ōju baḍagalu ko
ṭṭarāḍiya bayala Ōju yiṁti catussimeyoḷagā
gi sarvamānyava māḍi Aliguḷa hadike bārakūra ga
dyāṇa Ayidu hoṁnanu kuḷava kaḍidu keravaseya
vardhamāna svāmigaḷa naṁdādīpti ge prativaruṣadalū naḍasuva
yeṇṇe hāḍa Oṁdu yiṣṭanū naḍasi Ā saṁjara seṭṭi tanna sa
ṁtāna paraṁpareyāgi Ā caṁdrārkka stāyigaḷāgi bāḷi bahareṁ
du māḍikoṭṭa śilāśāsana . dānapālanayōrmmadhyē dā
nāt śrēyōnupālanaṁ dānātsvargamavāpnōti pālanādacyu
taṁpadaṁ . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vāyō harēta vasuṁdharāṁ ṣaṣṭi
rvvaruṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . yi
dharmavanu pālisidavaṁge vāraṇāsiyalu sahasra kavi
leya dānava māḍida puṇya yidharmakkārobbaru Aḷipi
davaru vāraṇāsiyalu sahasra kavileyanu vadista dōśa
kadalli hōharu . yiṁtappudakke pāṁḍyadēvarasa Oḍeyara
(vapa*) śīkaraṇa sthaḷada dēvappasēna bōvara maga paṁḍarisēnabō
vara baraha . varddhatāṁ jainaśāsanaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 29.146 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
